Access is required because this app can: Access is required because this app can control Docker and encrypted backup settings.
Add S3, WebDAV, SSH/SFTP, Azure, Dropbox: Add S3, WebDAV, SSH/SFTP, Azure, Dropbox, Google Drive, or local storage.
Admin access controls credentials and Do: Admin access controls credentials and Docker operations. Use a strong password and keep APP_KEY backed up.
Advanced: path already available inside: Advanced: path already available inside the Offen container.
Already saved. Leave blank to keep exist: Already saved. Leave blank to keep existing value.
Alternative to account name/key. Require: Alternative to account name/key. Required for SAS-only setups.
APP_KEY, sessions, cache, queued jobs, t: APP_KEY, sessions, cache, queued jobs, temporary restore files, and logs.
Backups are listed newest first from {na: Backups are listed newest first from {name}.
Coming later. Will stop/restart affected: Coming later. Will stop/restart affected containers.
Copy this token now. It will not be show: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
Create a bot with BotFather, then add th: Create a bot with BotFather, then add the bot to your chat or channel.
Create an application token in Gotify an: Create an application token in Gotify and paste your Gotify host.
Create and activate a backup destination: Create and activate a backup destination before uploading installation saves.
Create the first administrator and confi: Create the first administrator and configure destinations afterward.
Creates an encrypted .vvsave from the La: Creates an encrypted .vvsave from the Laravel storage volume. The archive is locked with this instance APP_KEY and does not include the key.
Credentials are already saved. Leave bla: Credentials are already saved. Leave blank to keep existing values.
Enter your account email and VolumeVault: Enter your account email and VolumeVault will send a reset link if mail is configured.
If provided, VolumeVault mounts it into: If provided, VolumeVault mounts it into the Offen container for backup runs.
Import replaces this instance storage. C: Import replaces this instance storage. Continue only on a fresh installation before creating users.
Keep APP_KEY outside the save. It is req: Keep APP_KEY outside the save. It is required to unlock this file during onboarding import, and losing it makes encrypted destination credentials unrecoverable.
Leave empty to keep the saved secret.
Leave setup fields empty to keep the sav: Leave setup fields empty to keep the saved encrypted Shoutrrr URL.
Local destinations need a path shared be: Local destinations need a path shared between VolumeVault and the temporary Offen container. Test the destination before trusting scheduled backups.
Losing APP_KEY means encrypted destinati: Losing APP_KEY means encrypted destination secrets can no longer be decrypted. Keep it backed up securely.
Optional host path to mount to the archi: Optional host path to mount to the archive path. Leave empty when both paths are identical.
Password reset by email is not configure: Password reset by email is not configured. Use the CLI reset command from the container instead.
Paste a complete Shoutrrr URL for any su: Paste a complete Shoutrrr URL for any supported service.
Paste the Discord webhook URL from Chann: Paste the Discord webhook URL from Channel settings > Integrations > Webhooks.
Path used inside the Offen backup contai: Path used inside the Offen backup container and readable by VolumeVault for listing/restores.
Pick a private topic name. Public ntfy.s: Pick a private topic name. Public ntfy.sh topics can be guessed by others.
Pushes the encrypted .vvsave to an activ: Pushes the encrypted .vvsave to an active backup destination under installation-saves/ when the provider supports paths.
Recommended. Never overwrites the origin: Recommended. Never overwrites the original volume.
Required for Cloudflare R2 and custom S3: Required for Cloudflare R2 and custom S3. AWS S3 can usually stay empty.
Restore a .vvsave with the previous APP_: Restore a .vvsave with the previous APP_KEY used to unlock it.
Restore can take time. The default mode: Restore can take time. The default mode creates a new Docker volume and does not overwrite the source volume.
Secrets are stored hashed and cannot be: Secrets are stored hashed and cannot be recovered.
Secure saves do not contain APP_KEY. Kee: Secure saves do not contain APP_KEY. Keep the old key available before migrating.
SQLite database and useful files from st: SQLite database and useful files from storage.
Start fresh or import a secure save from: Start fresh or import a secure save from an existing installation.
The first account is automatically admin: The first account is automatically admin and can manage users, encrypted destinations, notifications, restores, and Docker actions.
The restore run will appear in the resto: The restore run will appear in the restore run detail after submission.
The service account must have access to: The service account must have access to the folder.
This will invalidate existing browser se: This will invalidate existing browser sessions for the account.
Upload a secure .vvsave and provide the: Upload a secure .vvsave and provide the APP_KEY from the previous installation.
Use Bearer tokens for external API calls: Use Bearer tokens for external API calls. Prefer read-only tokens unless writes are required.
Use your SMTP server details. The passwo: Use your SMTP server details. The password is encrypted after saving.
Local archive paths cannot contain a col: Local archive paths cannot contain a colon.
Host path must be an absolute path.
Host path cannot be the filesystem root.
Host paths containing commas are not sup: Host paths containing commas are not supported.
Host path cannot contain . or .. segment: Host path cannot contain . or .. segments.
Host path access is disabled. Configure: Host path access is disabled. Configure at least one allowed prefix in VOLUMEVAULT_HOST_PATH_ALLOWLIST.
Host path is outside VOLUMEVAULT_HOST_PA: Host path is outside VOLUMEVAULT_HOST_PATH_ALLOWLIST. Allowed prefixes: {prefixes}.
Drag widgets to reorder, toggle the eye: Drag widgets to reorder, toggle the eye to show or hide. Click Done to save.
Update your account information and pref: Update your account information and preferred language.

Issue scoped Bearer tokens for external: Issue scoped Bearer tokens for external automation.
Export or upload an encrypted snapshot o: Export or upload an encrypted snapshot of this VolumeVault installation.

Back up an existing directory from the D: Back up an existing directory from the Docker host.

May temporarily interrupt containers usi: May temporarily interrupt containers using this volume.
Select the containers to stop while this: Select the containers to stop while this path is backed up. They are restarted afterwards.
These containers are stopped before the: These containers are stopped before the backup and restarted afterwards. Containers that no longer exist or are already stopped are skipped.
Selection is stored by container name, s: Selection is stored by container name, so it survives container recreation.
No Docker containers found. They may be: No Docker containers found. They may be unavailable, or Docker is not reachable.
Choose which notification channels this: Choose which notification channels this job can use. Inactive channels stay selected but do not send until reactivated.
Create a notification channel first, or: Create a notification channel first, or save this job without notifications.
Files whose full path matches this Go re: Files whose full path matches this Go regular expression are excluded from the archive. Leave empty to include everything.
Not comfortable with regex? Start with o: Not comfortable with regex? Start with one of these examples:
Ask for help if you are unsure: describe: Ask for help if you are unsure: describe what should be ignored, such as log files or cache folders, and VolumeVault can guide the regex.
You need at least one existing Docker vo: You need at least one existing Docker volume and one active backup destination before creating a job.
You need at least one active backup dest: You need at least one active backup destination before creating a job.
Sync Docker volumes first, or choose a h: Sync Docker volumes first, or choose a host path source.
The path must be an existing directory o: The path must be an existing directory on the Docker host. If VOLUMEVAULT_HOST_PATH_ALLOWLIST is set, it must match one of the allowed prefixes.
Sync volumes, add a destination, then cr: Sync volumes, add a destination, then create your first scheduled backup.
Add a destination, then choose a Docker: Add a destination, then choose a Docker volume or host path for your first scheduled backup.
Delete this backup job and its run histo: Delete this backup job and its run history?

Make sure VolumeVault can access the Doc: Make sure VolumeVault can access the Docker socket.
Delete this destination? Jobs using it w: Delete this destination? Jobs using it will also be removed.
Keep the default message, or override th: Keep the default message, or override the title and body sent after backup runs.

Preselect this channel when creating bac: Preselect this channel when creating backup jobs. It does not limit which channels a job can use.

URLs are encrypted at rest and never ret: URLs are encrypted at rest and never returned to the browser after save.
Add one channel, test it, then select it: Add one channel, test it, then select it from backup jobs.
No backup objects found. Run a backup fi: No backup objects found. Run a backup first or check the destination path.
Review visible product changes, migratio: Review visible product changes, migrations, and release notes for this installation.

Warn when a job has not produced a succe: Warn when a job has not produced a successful backup recently.
Detect jobs that keep finishing without: Detect jobs that keep finishing without any successful backup.
Escalate jobs that stay in error longer: Escalate jobs that stay in error longer than expected.
Detect unusually small or large successf: Detect unusually small or large successful backup archives.
Warn when a backup destination exceeds i: Warn when a backup destination exceeds its configured absolute storage thresholds.
Minutes between checks for this alert ty: Minutes between checks for this alert type.
Send repeated notifications while the al: Send repeated notifications while the alert stays active.

Create a notification channel before ena: Create a notification channel before enabling external notifications for this alert.
Configure absolute usage thresholds for: Configure absolute usage thresholds for the destination storage limit alert. Leave both empty to skip this destination.
Control proactive alert notifications an: Control proactive alert notifications and optional per-job thresholds.
Send alert notifications to this job's s: Send alert notifications to this job's selected channels.
Override global alert thresholds for thi: Override global alert thresholds for this job.
This job uses the global alert configura: This job uses the global alert configuration.
Server key trusted (fingerprint {fingerp: Server key trusted (fingerprint {fingerprint}). Compare it with the server before saving to rule out a first-contact attack.
Unable to reach the SSH server.
Optional but recommended. Use the button: Optional but recommended. Use the button to trust the current server key, or paste a host key (e.g. from ssh-keyscan) or its SHA256 fingerprint. Blocks man-in-the-middle attacks on the SFTP operations performed by VolumeVault; the backup container cannot verify host keys.
